title: Quick Guide - Osprey/Tern - Custom Swipe animation screen
scenario: Verify custom swipe animation and replay functionality on the Quick Guide's second screen showing two earbuds on Osprey or Tern devices
steps: Launch the app with the device connected.
Navigate to the second screen (showing two earbuds).
Tap the right blue circle to trigger zoom and animation.
Verify that the Replay button appears.
Ensure the screen zooms out correctly after the animation completes.
expected: The Replay button appears after tapping the right blue circle, replay functionality works correctly, and the screen zooms out properly after the animation completes.
